task: Clerk Billing UI slice — custom pricing/checkout/billing routes + studio enforcement UI
scope_note: Backend complete + verified. UI slice (11 stories) shipped. Both Basic and Pro grant all capabilities — no <Show> gates needed.

stories.title: Build /pricing route with custom Mantine plan cards (usePlans)
stories.note: Shipped. src/routes/pricing.tsx + src/components/billing/{PricingPage,PlanCard,types}.tsx. usePlans + Mantine SimpleGrid + monthly/annual toggle + current-plan badge + Subscribe CTA.

stories.title: Build /checkout route with CheckoutProvider + custom form
stories.note: Shipped. src/routes/checkout.tsx + CheckoutForm.tsx. Auto-starts CheckoutProvider session, renders Mantine order summary + Stripe PaymentElement with Mantine-themed appearance (src/lib/billing/stripeAppearance.ts). submit→confirm flow with error handling.

stories.title: Post-checkout interstitial component + polling
stories.note: Shipped. PostCheckoutInterstitial.tsx with clerk.session.reload() + syncUserPlan fire, reactive Convex query + periodic re-sync every 2s, 10s timeout with retry. Now guarded by hasResolvedRef to prevent finalize() re-fire (per architect refinement).

stories.title: Onboarding redirect for unsubscribed users
stories.note: Shipped. SubscriptionRequired.tsx wraps /studio via studio.tsx's Outlet. 3s grace period prevents flash-redirect of new subscribers during initial BillingSync.

stories.title: Build /account/billing route with current subscription + manage actions
stories.note: Shipped. src/routes/account.billing.tsx + AccountBillingPage.tsx. Displays current plan, credits progress, product count, Change plan link, Cancel subscription action with Mantine confirmation modal. New Convex action cancelMySubscription calls clerk.billing.cancelSubscriptionItem (end-of-period default).

stories.title: CreditsIndicator component in studio header
stories.note: Shipped. CreditsIndicator.tsx reads getBillingStatus. Rendered in studio.index and studio.$productId headers. Warning/exhausted color variants.

stories.title: Over-limit banners + disabled generation when credits exhausted
stories.note: Shipped by executor. Red Alert on both studio routes when credits exhausted. Generate/Submit/Retry disabled. Upgrade link to /pricing. VariationDrawer Generate button also gated (per architect refinement). Remove Background is intentionally NOT credit-gated because the backend doesn't consume credits for it in v1 (capability-only).

stories.title: Product-count indicator with at-limit state
stories.note: Shipped by executor. N/M products badge on studio.index. Yellow Alert at limit with Upgrade link. New Product dropzone + button disabled at limit.

stories.title: Nav links + __root.tsx updates
stories.note: Shipped. Desktop and mobile get Pricing NavLink. Mobile drawer also has Billing. Desktop Billing link added next to UserButton (per architect refinement).

stories.title: CI fence: @clerk/react/experimental imports stay inside src/components/billing/**
stories.note: Shipped. scripts/check-billing-fence.sh + wired into package.json build script. Only CheckoutForm.tsx and PricingPage.tsx import from @clerk/react/experimental.

stories.title: Final architect verification
stories.note: PROCEED WITH REFINEMENTS. All 10 stories APPLIED with evidence. 3 recommended refinements applied (desktop Billing link, finalize re-fire guard, VariationDrawer credits gate). Residual LOW items (retry timer leak, grace-start timing, cancel-item scoping) are acceptable follow-ups.

session_summary: UI slice complete. 8 commits on feat/clerk-billing: backend foundation + backend enforcement + backend API pivot + slug fixes + spike cleanup + UI slice (3 batches) + architect refinements. Build green. Fence clean. PR ready at https://github.com/nexttrack07/prodsnapv2/pull/new/feat/clerk-billing
